skills-package [P2] Run Phase 2 gate and update AGENTS.md monorepo structure
tasks.description:
Run the full Phase 2 gate to verify all File I/O modules compile and pass tests, then update AGENTS.md to document the new package.

## Phase 2 Gate

Run the following commands and verify all pass:

```bash
# Package-level checks
pnpm --filter @dorkos/skills typecheck
pnpm --filter @dorkos/skills build
pnpm --filter @dorkos/skills test -- --run

# Repo-wide checks
pnpm typecheck
pnpm build
pnpm test -- --run
```

All commands must succeed. If any fail, diagnose and fix the issue.

## Update AGENTS.md

Add `packages/skills/` to the monorepo structure section in `AGENTS.md`. In the existing structure tree under `packages/`, add:

```
│   ├── skills/            # @dorkos/skills - SKILL.md parser, schemas, utilities
```

Place it alphabetically among the existing package entries.

Also verify that the `@dorkos/skills/*` subpath pattern is documented if there is a path aliases section.

## Final Verification

After all changes, run:

```bash
pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm test -- --run
```

This verifies no cross-package breakage from the new package.

## Acceptance Criteria

- `pnpm --filter @dorkos/skills typecheck` passes.
- `pnpm --filter @dorkos/skills build` produces `dist/` with all compiled modules.
- `pnpm --filter @dorkos/skills test -- --run` passes all tests (schema, task-schema, command-schema, slug, duration, parser, writer, scanner, validator).
- `pnpm typecheck` and `pnpm build` pass repo-wide.
- `AGENTS.md` lists `packages/skills/` in the monorepo structure.
- No temp files, dead code, or TODOs remain in the package.
tasks.activeForm: Running Phase 2 gate and updating AGENTS.md monorepo structure
